case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO BILL HALL BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STATE REIMBURSEMENT FOR $80.00 FILING FEE(6103.5 GOV.CODE) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
